title: polypodium macropterum var. connexum
intro: Polypodium macropterum var. connexum, also known as the Joint Polypody fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, Polypodium macropterum var. connexum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
